title: Authors and Citation
text: Schöbitz L, Dubey Y (2026). “unhcrwash: WASH Data Refugee Camps Settlements (UNHCR).” doi:10.5281/zenodo.14185117. https://github.com/openwashdata/unhcrwash.
code: @Misc{unhcrwash:2026,   title = {unhcrwash: WASH Data From Refugee Camps and Settlements (UNHCR)},   year = {2026},   author = {Lars Schöbitz and Yash Dubey},   doi = {10.5281/zenodo.14185117},   url = {https://github.com/openwashdata/unhcrwash},   abstract = {This is a dataset on WASH indicators in refugee camps and settlements. The data was collected from the UNHCR Information Management System (IRIS) and was available on the UNHCR WASH dashboard. This dataset includes data from 227 sites and 36 countries.},   version = {0.2.0}, }

what: WASH Data From Refugee Camps and Settlements (UNHCR)
title: WASH Data From Refugee Camps and Settlements (UNHCR)
text: goal unhcrwash make available data WASH indicators refugee camps settlements.

title: WASH Data From Refugee Camps and Settlements (UNHCR)
text: dataset collected UNHCR Information Management System (IRIS) published UNHCR WASH dashboard. source longer available. former download URL, https://wash.unhcr.org/dashboard/data/unhcr_irhis_all_data.csv, now returns HTTP redirect UNHCR handbook page rather CSV. whole wash.unhcr.org dashboard retired, underlying data moved login-gated iRHIS portal .unhcr.org. --date version dataset can therefore longer generated original source. data shipped fixed historical snapshot covering 227 sites 36 countries 2013 2024. reason login access control iRHIS system level, applied UNHCR’s General Policy Personal Data Protection Privacy (UNHCR/HCP/2022/02). iRHIS also holds health nutrition data, UNHCR controls access platform whole. data package sensitive. Every record site-level aggregate WASH indicator (example, persons per toilet, litres water per person per day, percentage households access soap). contains personal data, individual household records, geocoordinates, carries data-protection concern appropriate publish open data.

title: WASH Data From Refugee Camps and Settlements (UNHCR)
text: can install development version unhcrwash GitHub : Alternatively, can download individual datasets CSV XLSX file table .
code: # install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("openwashdata/unhcrwash") ## Run the following code in console if you don't have the packages ## install.packages(c("dplyr", "knitr", "readr", "stringr", "gt", "kableExtra")) library(dplyr) library(knitr) library(readr) library(stringr) library(gt) library(kableExtra)

title: WASH Data From Refugee Camps and Settlements (UNHCR)
text: package provides access WASH indicators refugee camps settlements

title: WASH Data From Refugee Camps and Settlements (UNHCR)
text: dataset unhcrwash contains data WASH indicators refugee camps settlements. 6425 observations 27 variables overview variable names, see following table.

title: WASH Data From Refugee Camps and Settlements (UNHCR)
code: library(unhcrwash)  # Average Water Availability by Country  unhcrwash |> dplyr::group_by(country) |>    dplyr::summarise(avg_water_avail = mean(liters_per_person_per_day, na.rm = TRUE)) |>    dplyr::arrange(desc(avg_water_avail)) |>    head(5) |>    gt::gt() |>    gt::as_raw_html() library(ggplot2) # Toilet availability unhcrwash |>    dplyr::mutate(year = lubridate::year(as.Date(start_date))) |>  # Extract year as whole number   dplyr::filter(!is.na(year) & !is.na(persons_per_toilet)) |>    # Remove missing values   dplyr::group_by(year) |>    dplyr::summarise(avg_persons_per_toilet = mean(persons_per_toilet, na.rm = TRUE)) |>    ggplot2::ggplot(aes(x = year, y = avg_persons_per_toilet)) +   ggplot2::geom_line() +   ggplot2::labs(title = "Average Persons per Toilet in Refugee Camps",                 x = "Year",                 y = "Average persons per toilet") +   ggplot2::theme_minimal() # Countries with highest refugee populations unhcrwash |>    dplyr::group_by(country) |>    dplyr::summarise(total_population = sum(refugee_pop, na.rm = TRUE)) |>    dplyr::arrange(desc(total_population)) |>    head(5) |>    gt::gt() |>    gt::as_raw_html()

what: unhcrwash: Refugee Camp WASH indicators data from the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees — unhcrwash
title: unhcrwash: Refugee Camp WASH indicators data from the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees — unhcrwash
text: dataset WASH indicators refugee camps settlements. data collected UNHCR Information Management System (IRIS) available UNHCR WASH dashboard. dataset includes data 227 sites 36 countries. source dashboard since retired, dataset fixed historical snapshot (2013 2024) can longer regenerated. See package README details.

title: unhcrwash: Refugee Camp WASH indicators data from the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees — unhcrwash
unhcrwash: Refugee Camp WASH indicators data from the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees — unhcrwash
text: tibble 6425 rows 27 variables form_id Unique Identifier form start_date Start Date data collection end_date End date data collection location_id Unique Identifier location refugee camp location_name Name location refugee camp country Country refugee camp located post_emergency emergency ongoing (Emergency / Post Emergency) persons_per_handpump . persons per usable handpump well spring persons_per_tap Number persons per unit usable tap water source liters_per_person_per_day Average number litres potable water available per person per day non_chlorinated_0_cfu Percentage water quality tests conducted non-chlorinated water collection points returned results 0 colony-forming units (CFU) per 100 milliliters chlorinated_safe_water_quality Percentage water quality tests chlorinated collection points Free Residual Chlorine (FRC) levels within range 0.2 2 mg/L, turbidity less equal 5 NTU (Nephelometric Turbidity Units) households_with_toilet Percentage households access household toilet latrine, evaluated monthly basis persons_per_toilet Number persons per toilet latrine persons_per_shower Number persons per bath shower persons_per_hygiene_promoter Number persons per hygiene promoter refugee_pop Refugee Population reporting_monthly Monthly Reporting Period Indicator liters_per_person_household Average water (litres) collected per household per day potable_water_storage_10l Percentage households least 10 litres water storage capacity protected_water_sources Percentage households collecting water sheltered treated sources menstrual_hygiene_satisfaction Percentage women reproductive age satisfied facilities management menstrual hygiene waste household_toilet Percentage households latrine defecate_in_toilet Percentage households defecating toilet access_to_soap Percentage households access soap solid_waste_disposal_access Percentage households access waste disposal facility reporting_annual Annual Reporting Period Indicator

title: unhcrwash: Refugee Camp WASH indicators data from the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees — unhcrwash
text: UNHCR WASH dashboard / Information Management System (IRIS), formerly   <https://wash.unhcr.org/dashboard/data/unhcr_irhis_all_data.csv> (retired; data   now login-gated iRHIS portal <https://.unhcr.org>).

title: unhcrwash 0.2.0
text: Lars Schöbitz now maintainer package. Yash Dubey remains author, ETH Zurich recorded funder.

title: unhcrwash 0.2.0
text: Corrected data dictionary (data-raw/dictionary.csv) dataset documentation (R/unhcrwash.R) match actual shipped column names. 25 27 variable names previously referred original UNHCR field names rather renamed columns published data. Corrected dataset description across package: data covers 227 sites 36 countries (previously stated 191 sites 29 countries). Kept package metadata data/metadata/ sync corrected dictionary counts.

title: unhcrwash 0.2.0
text: Documented upstream UNHCR WASH dashboard retired. former source URL (https://wash.unhcr.org/dashboard/data/unhcr_irhis_all_data.csv) now redirects handbook page, data moved login-gated iRHIS portal (https://.unhcr.org) UNHCR’s General Policy Personal Data Protection Privacy (UNHCR/HCP/2022/02). result, dataset fixed historical snapshot (2013 2024) can longer regenerated. data-raw/data_processing.R retained provenance now stops explanatory error run. Clarified data package site-level aggregate WASH indicators. contains personal data poses data-protection concern.
